name: Mortality records
description: Death certificates with cause of death coded by ICD-10, deidentified at individual level.

name: Live births
description: Birth records including gestational age, birthweight, and municipality of residence.

name: Hospitalisation records
description: Inpatient admissions from the national hospital information system (AIH/SIH).

name: COVID-19 notifications
description: Confirmed and suspected COVID-19 cases reported to the national surveillance system.

name: Dengue notifications
description: Dengue fever notifications from SINAN, aggregated by municipality and epidemiological week.

name: Socioeconomic indicators
description: Municipal-level indicators from census and administrative records (HDI, income, education).
